title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Lombard International Enterprises - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Lombard International Enterprises - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
ICICI Lombard International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Indore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About ICICI Lombard International Enterprises:
ICICI Lombard International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Lombard International Enterprises!
